rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Motion To Enforce Injunction And Appoint Receiver Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declarations Of Anna Kihagi In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 11, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT ANNA KIHAGI Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Motion To Enforce Injunction And Appoint Receiver Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declarations Of Anna Kihagi In Support Thereof OFF CALENDAR. Motion has not been served in compliance with CCP 1010. See Proof of Service. Additionally, motion filed by Paul Manasian, not an attorney of record for Anna Kihagi since June 13, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL

rulings.Case Title: LANCE EVANDER ET AL VS. VERITAS INVESTMENTS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 11, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT 2619 MISSION I2, LLC, 1025 SUTTER I5, LLC, 735 O'FARRELL 17, LP, 737 PINE I1, LLC, VIC STRATEGIC MULTIFAMILY PARTNERS, LP, 430 BAKER I5 LLC, 430 BAKER I5 LP, 2824-2828 GEARY LLC, 781 O'FARRELL I7, LP MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to October 25, 2019. Plaintiff shall file a supplemental brief addressing whether ANTI-SLAPP is timely as to the new plaintiffs/defendants no later than October 18, 2019. rulings.Case Title: THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES ET AL VS. GGP, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 11, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT GGP, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings GRANTED without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to address in the opposition any allegations that are currently made in the complaint or that could be made if leave to amend is granted, showing the factual or legal basis for Plaintiff's assertion that GGP, Inc. may be liable for any relief that Plaintiff could obtain in this action. The Court further notes that it has never been presented with the Doe Amendment Application referenced in opposition. There are several available avenues for obtaining a Court's order depending on the nature of the request (e.g. motion, ex-parte, drop-off). None of the available methods have been employed by the Plaintiff. = (501/CFH)
